subject: Your OpenMentor profile has been deactivated
html:
Hi {{mentor_name}},

We've temporarily deactivated your mentor profile, so it's no longer visible in the OpenMentor catalog.

Why? You have mentorship requests that have been waiting for a response for more than 30 days. We do this to protect mentees from reaching out to mentors who aren't currently available — and to protect your reputation as a mentor.

Getting back is easy:

  1. Log in to your dashboard at openmentor.io/mentor/login — just request a magic link with your email.
  2. Resolve the waiting requests: get in touch with the mentees, or decline the requests you can't take.
  3. Re-activate your profile on the profile edit page — you'll appear in the catalog again right away.

Log in to your dashboard

If you're taking a longer break from mentoring, that's completely fine — your profile will be waiting for you. And if you think this was a mistake, write to us at hello@openmentor.io.

Hope to see you back soon!
The OpenMentor Team

This is an automated message from OpenMentor

https://openmentor.io
text:
Hi {{mentor_name}},

We've temporarily deactivated your mentor profile, so it's no longer visible in the OpenMentor catalog.

Why? You have mentorship requests that have been waiting for a response for more than 30 days. We do this to protect mentees from reaching out to mentors who aren't currently available — and to protect your reputation as a mentor.

Getting back is easy:

1) Log in to your dashboard at https://openmentor.io/mentor/login — just request a magic link with your email.
2) Resolve the waiting requests: get in touch with the mentees, or decline the requests you can't take.
3) Re-activate your profile on the profile edit page — you'll appear in the catalog again right away.

If you're taking a longer break from mentoring, that's completely fine — your profile will be waiting for you. And if you think this was a mistake, write to us at hello@openmentor.io.

Hope to see you back soon!
The OpenMentor Team
